name: PiggyMetrics config 配置中心
description: PiggyMetrics config 组件专用模板，提供各业务组件的 Spring Cloud Config 文件。

data.application.yml:
spring:
  cloud:
    config:
      server:
        native:
          search-locations: file:/etc/piggymetrics-config/shared
  profiles:
    active: native
  security:
    user:
      name: user
      password: ${CONFIG_SERVICE_PASSWORD}
server:
  port: 8888
data.shared-application.yml:
logging:
  level:
    org.springframework.security: INFO
hystrix:
  command:
    default:
      execution:
        isolation:
          thread:
            timeoutInMilliseconds: 10000
eureka:
  instance:
    prefer-ip-address: true
  client:
    serviceUrl:
      defaultZone: ${EUREKA_URL}
security:
  oauth2:
    resource:
      user-info-uri: http://auth-service/uaa/users/current
spring:
  rabbitmq:
    host: ${RABBITMQ_HOST}
    port: ${RABBITMQ_PORT}
    username: ${RABBITMQ_USERNAME}
    password: ${RABBITMQ_PASSWORD}
data.account-service.yml:
security:
  oauth2:
    client:
      clientId: account-service
      clientSecret: ${ACCOUNT_SERVICE_PASSWORD}
      accessTokenUri: http://auth-service/uaa/oauth/token
      grant-type: client_credentials
      scope: server
spring:
  data:
    mongodb:
      host: ${MONGODB_HOST}
      username: ${MONGODB_USERNAME}
      password: ${MONGODB_PASSWORD}
      database: piggymetrics_account
      port: ${MONGODB_PORT}
      authentication-database: admin
server:
  servlet:
    context-path: /accounts
  port: 6000
feign:
  hystrix:
    enabled: true
data.gateway.yml:
hystrix:
  command:
    default:
      execution:
        isolation:
          thread:
            timeoutInMilliseconds: 20000
ribbon:
  ReadTimeout: 20000
  ConnectTimeout: 20000
zuul:
  ignoredServices: '*'
  host:
    connect-timeout-millis: 20000
    socket-timeout-millis: 20000
  routes:
    auth-service:
      path: /uaa/**
      url: http://auth-service/uaa
      stripPrefix: false
      sensitiveHeaders:
    account-service:
      path: /accounts/**
      serviceId: account-service
      stripPrefix: false
      sensitiveHeaders:
    statistics-service:
      path: /statistics/**
      serviceId: statistics-service
      stripPrefix: false
      sensitiveHeaders:
    notification-service:
      path: /notifications/**
      serviceId: notification-service
      stripPrefix: false
      sensitiveHeaders:
server:
  port: 4000
data.notification-service.yml:
security:
  oauth2:
    client:
      clientId: notification-service
      clientSecret: ${NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_PASSWORD}
      accessTokenUri: http://auth-service/uaa/oauth/token
      grant-type: client_credentials
      scope: server
server:
  servlet:
    context-path: /notifications
  port: 8000
remind:
  cron: 0 0 0 * * *
  email:
    text: "Hey, {0}! We've missed you here on PiggyMetrics."
    subject: PiggyMetrics reminder
backup:
  cron: 0 0 12 * * *
  email:
    text: "Your account backup is ready."
    subject: PiggyMetrics account backup
    attachment: backup.json
spring:
  data:
    mongodb:
      host: ${MONGODB_HOST}
      username: ${MONGODB_USERNAME}
      password: ${MONGODB_PASSWORD}
      database: piggymetrics_notification
      port: ${MONGODB_PORT}
      authentication-database: admin
  mail:
    host: smtp.gmail.com
    port: 465
    username: dev-user
    password: ${MAIL_PASSWORD}
data.statistics-service.yml:
security:
  oauth2:
    client:
      clientId: statistics-service
      clientSecret: ${STATISTICS_SERVICE_PASSWORD}
      accessTokenUri: http://auth-service/uaa/oauth/token
      grant-type: client_credentials
      scope: server
spring:
  data:
    mongodb:
      host: ${MONGODB_HOST}
      username: ${MONGODB_USERNAME}
      password: ${MONGODB_PASSWORD}
      database: piggymetrics_statistics
      port: ${MONGODB_PORT}
      authentication-database: admin
server:
  servlet:
    context-path: /statistics
  port: 7000
rates:
  url: https://api.exchangeratesapi.io
